name: sort-direction
instruction: Rename `most_expensive_name` to `cheapest_name` and change it to return the name of the cheapest product instead of the most expensive. Remove the `list.reverse()` call so the sort is ascending (cheapest first). Do not change any other function.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.sort_by(xs, (x) => key)` sorts ascending. `list.reverse(xs)` reverses a list. `list.first(xs)` returns `Option[A]`. `list.fold(xs, init, (acc, x) => val)` reduces a list.
